emails.subject: Pompano dev ag
emails.body: Pompano dev ag Hi there. Is the site plan approval a different document than the development order? Thanks, Kay

emails.subject: RE: Pompano dev ag
emails.body: RE: Pompano dev ag The=01;conditional site plan approval=01;resulted in the generation of the Dev.=20 Order. =01; Sorry about the delayed response, I've been having major e-mail problems as= a=20 result of the mirgration over to Outlook. =01; Look forward to discussing the agreements Monday at 11 EST. =01; Steve =20
